name: Rhubarb-Strawberry Conserve
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat sugar and water to boiling in a 3-quart saucepan, stirring constantly.
2. Add rhubarb to the boiling mixture.
3. Boil gently for about 15 minutes, stirring frequently until thickened.
4. Stir in strawberries, walnuts, and raisins.
5. Bring to a boil again; simmer gently for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Skim off any foam that rises to the surface.
7. Pour mixture into hot, sterilized jars, leaving 1/4-inch headspace.
8. Wipe rims of jars clean and seal.
9. Allow jars to cool on a rack for one hour.
10. Store in refrigerator for up to 2 months.
